# Swarm & Bee — swarmandbee.ai
# LLM-readable site description

> Swarm & Bee builds vertical AI models and curates platinum-grade training data.

## Company
- Name: Swarm & Bee
- Website: https://swarmandbee.ai
- Email: build@swarmandbee.com
- Phone: 561-532-7120
- GitHub: https://github.com/SudoSuOps
- HuggingFace: https://huggingface.co/SwarmandBee
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/swarmandbee
- Discord: https://discord.gg/sNjJrND5eb

## Two Verticals

### 1. Build — LLM
We fine-tune vertical AI models on sovereign compute. The SwarmCRE franchise covers commercial real estate intelligence from 0.8B edge to 122B Founder.

Models:
- SwarmCRE-122B "Founder FTW" — 122B params, fp8, 2 GPUs. Full-stack CRE reasoning and portfolio strategy.
- SwarmCRE-9B "Morey" — 9.5B params, Mamba-Transformer hybrid. The flagship CRE analyst. Chat & voice. Trained on 643K CRE pairs.
- SwarmCRE-4B — Compact edge CRE model. Fits Jetson Orin Nano and BeeBox.
- SwarmCRE-2B — Ultra-light CRE analyst. 2GB VRAM. Desktop and mobile.
- SwarmCRE-0.8B — Nano model. CPU inference. Embedded and IoT.
- BeeMini-3B — Skill router. 98.3% valid JSON. 1.8GB Q4_K_M.

### 2. Curation
Every training pair passes an 8-step SwarmCurator pipeline with unappeallable verdicts:
1. Source — Raw generation via Together.ai and domain grinders
2. Grind — Specialty tagging and domain formatting
3. Schema — Structural validation and field completeness
4. CoVe — Chain of Verification, 5 criteria scored 1-10
5. Judge — SwarmJudge PASS/FAIL verdict
6. Trajectory — Multi-step reasoning verification
7. Cross-Val — Deduplication, consistency, adversarial probing
8. Platinum — Final unappeallable promotion

Stats: 1.2M platinum pairs, 85+ specialties, 0% override rate.

We offer Custom Curation Builds: you define the domain, specialties, task types, and volume. We run the full 8-step pipeline on 128 GPUs. You receive platinum JSONL with CoVe scores, trajectory labels, and train/eval splits.

## Compute
- 128 RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell GPUs
- 96GB VRAM each
- 12,288GB (12TB) total VRAM
- We own the racks. We cook the rails.

## SwarmSkills (19 live)
broker_senior, broker_junior, intelligence_query, bookmaker, deal_tracker, developer, signal_scraper, investor, exchange_1031, market_report, lead_scorer, email_composer, comp_analyzer, rent_roll_analyzer, debt_analyzer, tax_assessor, site_selector, portfolio_optimizer, news_digest

API: POST /skill/{name} at router.swarmandbee.ai

## BeeBox
Sovereign edge AI appliance. BeeMini-3B router + SwarmCRE-4B quality gate locally. 72% local inference, 28% fleet escalation. Target price $499.

## Built With
- Qwen3.5 (base models)
- Unsloth (training — 1.5x faster, 50% less VRAM)
- llama.cpp (GGUF quantization and inference)
- Cloudflare (Workers, D1, R2, Vectorize, Pages)
- Together.ai (data cooking and generation)
- NVIDIA (RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell, Jetson Orin Nano)
- Supabase (Postgres backend, training run tracking)

## Morey — SwarmCRE-9B
Morey is the SwarmCRE-9B AI CRE analyst. Chat and voice interface. Capabilities: underwriting, IC memo drafting, deal analysis, debt sizing, rent roll analysis, 1031 exchange guidance, market intelligence, lead scoring, site selection.
URL: https://swarmandbee.ai/morey

## SwarmSignal — The Chronicle of Truth
SwarmSignal is the publication arm of Swarm & Bee. AI market intelligence written by AI, verified by builders. Coverage: infrastructure, model engineering, data factories, sovereign AI.
URL: https://swarmandbee.ai/signal

## SwarmCare — Continuous AI Signal Infrastructure
Dataset curation, trajectory validation, LoRA fine-tuning, evaluation gates, drift monitoring.
URL: https://swarmandbee.ai/swarmcare

## Trending Curator — Live Dataset Intelligence
The Swarm monitors the global AI ecosystem and identifies the highest demand training data opportunities in real time. Every month we curate the Top 5 dataset needs and produce up to 50,000 verified pairs per vertical. One subscription ($49/mo), five live dataset streams, up to 250,000 curated training pairs every month.
Pipeline: SwarmSignal (detect) → Gap Analysis (identify) → Pair Cooking (produce) → SwarmJudge (verify) → Object Release (deliver).
URL: https://swarmandbee.ai/curator
